user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Priority: LOW
Category: Follow-up

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m checking in to see how things are going with [Issue/Topic] since we last spoke five days ago.

I want to make sure everything is still working smoothly for you and that you haven't run into any further trouble. If you're all set, no need to reply—but if you need any more help, just let me know and I'll be happy to jump back in.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support follow-up and provided a professional draft response as requested.
